title: carex atrata subsp. perfusca
intro: Carex atrata subsp. perfusca, also known as the mountain sedge or dark sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex atrata subsp. perfusca include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness.
